# AbsolutelySkilled

> A registry of 155+ production-ready skills for AI coding agents like Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and OpenAI Codex. Skills teach AI agents specialized knowledge across software engineering, marketing, design, operations, and more.

## Skills Categories

- [engineering](https://www.absolutelyskilled.pro/category/engineering): 46 skills
- [operations](https://www.absolutelyskilled.pro/category/operations): 27 skills
- [marketing](https://www.absolutelyskilled.pro/category/marketing): 11 skills
- [ai-ml](https://www.absolutelyskilled.pro/category/ai-ml): 10 skills
- [devtools](https://www.absolutelyskilled.pro/category/devtools): 9 skills
- [product](https://www.absolutelyskilled.pro/category/product): 8 skills
- [sales](https://www.absolutelyskilled.pro/category/sales): 7 skills
- [data](https://www.absolutelyskilled.pro/category/data): 6 skills
- [design](https://www.absolutelyskilled.pro/category/design): 5 skills
- [video](https://www.absolutelyskilled.pro/category/video): 5 skills
- [infra](https://www.absolutelyskilled.pro/category/infra): 4 skills
- [monitoring](https://www.absolutelyskilled.pro/category/monitoring): 4 skills
- [workflow](https://www.absolutelyskilled.pro/category/workflow): 3 skills
- [cloud](https://www.absolutelyskilled.pro/category/cloud): 3 skills
- [writing](https://www.absolutelyskilled.pro/category/writing): 2 skills
- [analytics](https://www.absolutelyskilled.pro/category/analytics): 2 skills
- [developer-tools](https://www.absolutelyskilled.pro/category/developer-tools): 1 skills
- [communication](https://www.absolutelyskilled.pro/category/communication): 1 skills
- [game-development](https://www.absolutelyskilled.pro/category/game-development): 1 skills

## Supported AI Agents

- [Claude Code](https://www.absolutelyskilled.pro/agents/claude-code): Skills for Anthropic's AI coding agent
- [Cursor](https://www.absolutelyskilled.pro/agents/cursor): Skills for the AI-first code editor
- [Windsurf](https://www.absolutelyskilled.pro/agents/windsurf): Skills for Codeium's AI-powered IDE
- [GitHub Copilot](https://www.absolutelyskilled.pro/agents/github-copilot): Skills for GitHub's AI pair programmer
- [Gemini CLI](https://www.absolutelyskilled.pro/agents/gemini-cli): Skills for Google's AI coding agent
- [OpenAI Codex](https://www.absolutelyskilled.pro/agents/openai-codex): Skills for OpenAI's cloud-based agent

## Key Pages

- [All Skills](https://www.absolutelyskilled.pro/skills): Browse and search all 155+ skills
- [All Agents](https://www.absolutelyskilled.pro/agents): Browse skills by AI agent
- [Blog](https://www.absolutelyskilled.pro/blog): Guides and tutorials
- [GitHub](https://github.com/AbsolutelySkilled/AbsolutelySkilled): Source code and contributions

## Install Any Skill

```
npx skills add AbsolutelySkilled/AbsolutelySkilled --skill <skill-name>
```

## Optional

- [Full skill catalog](https://www.absolutelyskilled.pro/llms-full.txt): Complete details for every skill
